sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 40:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 40:1
items.html: A light that expands in the vessels gradually, from a more refined to coarser, is called “from above downward.” This light is called “direct light.”
